CustomField.formula: CASE( Payment_Plan__c, "Standard Payment Plan – 0% Discount", 0, "30% Down Payment – 4% Discount", 0.04, "50% Down Payment – 8% Discount", 0.08, "100% Down Payment (No ROI) – 20% Discount", 0.20, "100% Down Payment (With ROI) – 0% Discount", 0, 0 )
CustomField.label: Offer/Promotion
